modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Listserv not sending messages after submission.

full_description_text: I sent a message to the listserv. But it’s not sending out. No one is getting the emails. This is really confusing and I need help.
short_description: Listserv not sending messages after submission.
description: I sent a message to the listserv. But it’s not sending out. No one is getting the emails. This is really confusing and I need help.
